title: DETERMINATION OF INULIN IN THE ROOTS OF ARCTIUM LEOSPERMUM L.
author: Temirov, Alisher
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article presents the results of research on the development of a method for the quantitative determination of inulin in the roots of Arctium leospermum L.     growing in Uzbekistan.    For this purpose, a spectrophotometric method was used. The data obtained were statistically processed.
steps_raw: The article presents the results of research on the development of a method for the quantitative determination of inulin in the roots of Arctium leospermum L.     growing in Uzbekistan.    For this purpose, a spectrophotometric method was used. The data obtained were statistically processed.
